settings.text: Managed services, troubleshooting, and same-day repairs for small businesses and home offices in Portland.

settings.title: IT Support Built for Small Teams
settings.description: Whether you run a 20-person office or work from your kitchen table, we keep your technology running so you can focus on your work.

settings.title: Small Businesses
settings.description: Monthly managed IT, network monitoring, cybersecurity, and help desk support for teams of 5 to 50. One number to call for everything.

settings.title: Home Offices
settings.description: Workstation setup, troubleshooting, data backup, and on-call support for remote workers and freelancers who need reliable IT without a full-time department.

settings.title: Managed IT
settings.description: Proactive monitoring, maintenance, and help desk for a fixed monthly rate. We catch problems before you notice them.

settings.title: Cybersecurity
settings.description: Firewall management, endpoint protection, threat monitoring, and quarterly security reviews for your business.

settings.title: Cloud Services
settings.description: Microsoft 365 management, cloud backups, and migration from on-premise systems. Your data, always accessible.

settings.title: Network Setup
settings.description: Office Wi-Fi, cabling, switches, routers, and VPN configuration. Reliable connectivity from the ground up.

settings.title: Computer Repair
settings.description: Hardware diagnostics, component replacement, OS reinstalls, and data recovery. Most repairs completed same-day.

settings.title: Help Desk
settings.description: Same-day remote and on-site support when something breaks or stops working. One call, one fix.

settings.title: Call or Submit a Request
settings.description: You tell us what is going on. We ask a few questions to understand the scope and urgency, then schedule remote or on-site help.

settings.title: We Diagnose the Problem
settings.description: Remote or on-site, we identify the root cause — not just the symptom. You get a clear explanation of what went wrong and what it takes to fix it before we proceed.

settings.title: We Fix It
settings.description: We resolve the issue and confirm everything is working. For managed clients, we document the fix and update your system profile so the same problem does not happen twice.

settings.quote: Our server went down on a Friday afternoon and Uplink had us back online within two hours. That kind of response time is why we switched to their managed plan.
settings.author: Rachel Torres

settings.quote: We used to call three different people for three different problems. Now we call Uplink for everything. They handle our network, our backups, and our security — and they actually explain what they are doing.
settings.author: Mark Ellison

settings.quote: I work from home and my laptop died the morning of a big deadline. They came to my house, recovered my files, and set me up on a loaner within three hours. Cannot recommend them enough.
settings.author: Diana Chu

settings.text: (503) 555-0142 — call us or submit a request online.
